package rulefixtures

// scenario for sync_once_do_inside_loop: `sync.Once.Do(...)` inside loops.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule677NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario677Negative(records []Rule677NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
